mapper.insert:
SELECT REPLY_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO REPLY (REPLY_NO, BOARD_NO, CONTENT, WRITER) VALUES (#{replyNo}, #{boardNo}, #{content}, #{writer})
mapper.select: SELECT REPLY_NO, BOARD_NO, CONTENT, WRITER, REG_DATE, UPD_DATE FROM REPLY WHERE BOARD_NO = #{boardNo} ORDER BY REPLY_NO ASC
SELECT REPLY_NO, BOARD_NO, WRITER, CONTENT, REG_DATE, UPD_DATE FROM REPLY WHERE REPLY_NO = #{replyNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE REPLY SET CONTENT = #{content}, UPD_DATE = SYSDATE WHERE REPLY_NO = #{replyNo}
